B

baseIndex - Variable in class common.binary.ByteArrayReader
 
baseIndex - Variable in class common.binary.ByteArrayReaderOld
 
baseOffset - Variable in class heif.boxes.ItemLocationBox.ExtentData
 
baseOffsetSize - Variable in class heif.boxes.ItemLocationBox
 
batch - package batch
Provides the core orchestration logic for batch-processing media metadata.
BatchBuilder - Class in batch
Implements the Builder design pattern for constructing and validating BatchConfiguration instances used by batch-processing operations.
BatchBuilder() - Constructor for class batch.BatchBuilder
 
BatchConfiguration - Class in batch
An immutable configuration object representing the validated parameters for a batch processing operation.
BatchConfiguration(Path, Path, String, ZonedDateTime, String[], boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for class batch.BatchConfiguration
Creates an immutable configuration from validated builder state.
BatchErrorException - Exception in batch
This exception is thrown when the running application is terminated abruptly.
BatchErrorException() - Constructor for exception batch.BatchErrorException
Constructs a default BatchErrorException instance without an error message.
BatchErrorException(String) - Constructor for exception batch.BatchErrorException
Constructs a BatchErrorException instance with the specified error message.
BatchErrorException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception batch.BatchErrorException
Constructs a BatchErrorException instance with the specified cause.
BatchErrorException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception batch.BatchErrorException
Constructs a BatchErrorException instance with the specified detail error message and the cause.
BatchMetadataUtils - Class in batch
 
BatchMetadataUtils() - Constructor for class batch.BatchMetadataUtils
Prevents direct instantiation.
bd_debug - Variable in class batch.BatchBuilder
Indicates whether diagnostic logging should be enabled.
bd_descending - Variable in class batch.BatchBuilder
Indicates whether chronological ordering should be descending.
bd_displayMetadata - Variable in class batch.BatchBuilder
Indicates whether metadata information should be displayed instead of processing files.
bd_embedDateTime - Variable in class batch.BatchBuilder
Determines whether the media date should be embedded in generated filenames.
bd_files - Variable in class batch.BatchBuilder
Optional list of filenames explicitly selected for processing.
bd_force - Variable in class batch.BatchBuilder
Indicates whether existing metadata dates should be overwritten.
bd_prefix - Variable in class batch.BatchBuilder
Filename prefix applied to generated output files.
bd_skipVideoFiles - Variable in class batch.BatchBuilder
Indicates whether video files should be excluded from processing.
bd_sourceDir - Variable in class batch.BatchBuilder
Source directory containing media files to process.
bd_target - Variable in class batch.BatchBuilder
Target directory for processed files.
bd_userDate - Variable in class batch.BatchBuilder
User-supplied date string prior to parsing and validation.
BinaryInput - Interface in common.binary
Defines the core data-reading contract for binary streaming components, supporting standard stream positioning and navigation operations.
BinaryOutput - Interface in common.binary
Defines the core data-writing contract for binary streaming components.
bitsPerChannel - Variable in class heif.boxes.PixelInformationBox
 
BITSTREAM_HEADER_BUDGET - Static variable in class webp.RiffHandler
 
Box - Class in heif.boxes
Represents a generic HEIF Box, according to ISO/IEC 14496-12:2015.
Box(BinaryInput) - Constructor for class heif.boxes.Box
Constructs a Box by reading its header from the specified BinaryInput.
Box(Box) - Constructor for class heif.boxes.Box
A copy constructor to replicate field values one by one, useful for sub-classing, retaining the original field values.
BOX_SIZE_TO_EOF - Static variable in class heif.boxes.Box
 
BoxCategory() - Constructor for enum heif.HeifBoxType.BoxCategory
 
BoxFactory - Class in heif
 
BoxFactory() - Constructor for class heif.BoxFactory
 
BoxHandler - Class in heif
Handles parsing of HEIF/HEIC file structures based on the ISO Base Media Format.
BoxHandler(Path) - Constructor for class heif.BoxHandler
Constructs a BoxHandler to open the specified file for the parsing of the embedded metadata, honouring the big-endian byte order in accordance with the ISO/IEC 14496-12 documentation.
BoxHandler.MetadataType - Enum in heif
 
boxSize - Variable in class heif.boxes.Box
 
boxTypeBytes - Variable in class heif.boxes.Box
 
buffer - Variable in class common.binary.ByteArrayReader
 
buffer - Variable in class common.binary.ByteArrayReaderOld
 
buffer(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
bufferIndex - Variable in class common.binary.ByteArrayReader
 
bufferIndex - Variable in class common.binary.ByteArrayReaderOld
 
build() - Method in class batch.BatchBuilder
Validates the current builder state and creates a new MediaMetadataConsole instance.
buildConfig() - Method in class batch.BatchBuilder
Validates the current configuration and returns an immutable BatchConfiguration snapshot.
ByteArrayReader - Class in common.binary
Performs in-memory reading of primitive data types from a byte array.
ByteArrayReader(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Constructor for class common.binary.ByteArrayReader
Constructs a reader for the input byte array, starting at the given offset and using the specified byte order.
ByteArrayReader(byte[]) - Constructor for class common.binary.ByteArrayReader
Constructs a reader for the input byte array using big-endian byte order.
ByteArrayReader(byte[], ByteOrder) - Constructor for class common.binary.ByteArrayReader
Constructs a reader for the input byte array using the specified byte order.
ByteArrayReader(byte[], int) - Constructor for class common.binary.ByteArrayReader
Constructs a reader for the input byte array, starting at the given offset and using big-endian byte order.
ByteArrayReaderOld - Class in common.binary
Performs in-memory reading of primitive data types from a byte array.
ByteArrayReaderOld(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Constructor for class common.binary.ByteArrayReaderOld
Constructs a reader for the input byte array, starting at the given offset and using the specified byte order.
ByteArrayReaderOld(byte[]) - Constructor for class common.binary.ByteArrayReaderOld
Constructs a reader for the input byte array using big-endian byte order.
ByteArrayReaderOld(byte[], ByteOrder) - Constructor for class common.binary.ByteArrayReaderOld
Constructs a reader for the input byte array using the specified byte order.
ByteArrayReaderOld(byte[], int) - Constructor for class common.binary.ByteArrayReaderOld
Constructs a reader for the input byte array, starting at the given offset and using big-endian byte order.
byteOrder - Variable in class common.binary.AbstractBinaryStream
 
byteOrder - Variable in class tif.TifMetadata
 
ByteValueConverter - Class in common
Utility class providing static methods for converting raw byte arrays to primitive values, arrays, strings, and RationalNumber objects, particularly for image metadata parsing formats such as TIFF, Exif, PNG, HEIF, and WebP.
ByteValueConverter() - Constructor for class common.ByteValueConverter
Default constructor is unsupported and will always throw an exception.
ByteValueConverterBB - Class in common.binary
ByteBuffer-backed utility for decoding primitive values and structures from byte arrays.
ByteValueConverterBB() - Constructor for class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
